title: Ability to "pin" or lock the first column on a dashboard table
excerpt: It would be extremely helpful if you can pin or lock the first column on a table within a dashboard. Right now, when you scroll over, the item name moves away, so you can’t see which item the fields relate to. It would b…

posts.author: annadayton (Anna Dayton)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be extremely helpful if you can pin or lock the first column on a table within a dashboard. Right now, when you scroll over, the item name moves away, so you can’t see which item the fields relate to. It would be nice if this would stay put as you scroll over to look at the other columns similar to the standard board view.

posts.author: JustinThibault (Justin Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1!

If it’s fine for the standard board view - why is it not a thing for a table view?!?!?!

posts.author: cat.goliath (Cat)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this is a functionality that completely prevents me from using dashboards. The latest dashboard update is great because it’s more dynamic, but can we please have the ability to pin columns? At least the very first column, like how a regular board would show a table.

posts.author: aisaksson (Anna-Lena Isaksson)
posts.cookedHtml: And ability to pin/freeze the first row as well.
